message:
Add DoD test coverage: SIGTERM escalation, reasoning effort, subagent isolation, cross-provider parity

WS8a: SIGTERM-trapping process verified killed by SIGKILL within 6s
WS8b: "medium" reasoning effort passed through; empty means no override
WS8c: Subagent history is independent from parent
WS8d: Subagent can read files written by parent (shared filesystem)
WS8f: 10 scenarios × 3 providers cross-provider parity matrix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
